title: Build a status card
description: Create static HTML/CSS for a compact local-model status card.
instructions: The page must contain a card with data-testid="model-status-card".
Include visible text for Qwen3 4B, OpenClaw Native, Pass, and 90/100.
Use a semantic heading and a list of metrics.
CSS must define .status-card, use display: grid or flex, include border-radius no larger than 8px, and include a responsive @media rule.
